name: Undercover Monstergirl (TF)
description:
You are a top secret agent, the best of the best. Your mission, should you choose to accept it is become a sexy stripper monster girl!

---

Contains: Gender bending / swap, transformation, TF, corruption

---

Heads up I really recommend mentioning what kind of monster girl you want to be when the time comes, you can leave it up to the bot, but it can be pretty nondescript or random. Also, the chat can struggle / get confused at the strip club. So if this bot becomes popular, I might make Pt.2 focused on the club interaction. So let me know what you think!

I have decided to make a part two on this! However I will be finishing off a couple of bot ideas first, so it may be a little while before we see anything!
